response:
Alex reads books.
Books bring joy.
Joy fills heart.
Heart holds hope.
Hope sparks change.
Change shifts views.
Views alter minds.
Minds seek truth.
Truth guides paths.
Paths lead far.
Far reaches new.
New ideas grow.
Grow strong roots.
Roots anchor souls.
Souls find peace.
Peace calms storms.
Storms pass quickly.
Quickly time flies.
Flies away fast.
Fast days pass.
Pass by now.
Now count pages.
Pages sum up.
Up totals rise.
Rise high up.
Up comes math.
Math solves sums.
Sums equal forty.
Forty pages daily.
Daily habits form.
Form new ways.
Ways open doors.
Doors reveal light.
